title: Fix Lying Comment in GatherItemDecompose + Resolve _agentRuntime Dead Code
description:
Council Review Sprint 51 High Priority Task.

Two related issues discovered during council source verification:

1. GatherItemDecompose comment (~line 950 of HtnTaskLibrary.cs) says "Default plan: SearchMemory → MineBlock → GetStatus (3 actions)" but the actual code emits GetStatus → [optional Wander] → MineBlock — ZERO SearchMemory actions. This is either a documentation bug (the comment describes intended behavior never implemented) or a code bug (SearchMemory was removed but comment wasn't updated). Fix: either integrate SearchMemory into gather decomposition or update the comment to match current behavior.

2. _agentRuntime field is injected in AgentBackgroundService constructor (AgentRuntime? agentRuntime = null) but appears unused anywhere in ~2300 lines. Either integrate it (if migration in progress) or remove dead code.

Source: Council Review 2026-06-26, MC-1 and MC-2, Skeptical Reviewer findings

comments.author: anonymous
comments.body:
Council report: Data/Pages/council/audit-findings-consolidation-council-2026-06-26.md

These are council-discovered findings (MC-1, MC-2) that neither audit caught. The GatherItemDecompose comment is actively misleading. The _agentRuntime field is either dead code or an incomplete migration — resolve in S51.
